subject: RecursiveIntell semantic-memory via live MCP

scenarios.name: supported_fact_write_and_retrieval
scenarios.evidence: fact 4be15441... added; current search returned replacement c402e115... at rank 1

scenarios.name: unsupported_model_proposal_admission
scenarios.evidence: ephemeral_inference without evidence_refs blocked by admission gate; high-risk no-evidence claim disposition=defer, can_promote=false

scenarios.name: supersession_current_view
scenarios.evidence: supersede edge 5e82f8e0... created; current search returned eu-central-1 and reported superseded_filtered_count=1

scenarios.name: bitemporal_as_of_before_supersession
scenarios.evidence: as-of 21:11:50 returned both old us-east-2 and future replacement created at 21:12:01

scenarios.name: namespace_isolation
scenarios.evidence: search restricted to hostile-benchmark namespace returned no ALPHA-9931 fact stored in hostile-secret namespace

scenarios.name: duplicate_replay_idempotency
scenarios.evidence: re-adding identical replacement returned existing fact id c402e115...

scenarios.name: prompt_injection_inert_storage
scenarios.evidence: adversarial text stored and returned as untrusted data; no command execution occurred

scenarios.name: contradiction_preservation_detection
scenarios.evidence: content contradiction scan returned one numeric disagreement between old and replacement facts

summary.blocking_failure: bitemporal as-of query leaked a fact created after the requested timestamp and retained the superseded old/new pair

claim_boundary: Live single-system integrity run. Not a named competitor comparison, not a scale benchmark, and not proof of best-overall agent memory.
